name: saml2aws-troubleshooting
description: Troubleshoot and fix saml2aws login failures, especially 'Invalid role string only 0 tokens' errors

diagnostic_steps.notes: Standard version is 2.36.17 from S3, not brew. Check provider is Browser, URL is set correctly.

diagnostic_steps.action: Check for stale browser session cache (MOST COMMON CAUSE)
diagnostic_steps.notes: If these files exist and are old, they are likely causing the browser to replay a stale Okta session instead of showing the login page. Browser opening and closing in ~2 seconds is the telltale sign.
Back up rather than delete, in case we need to inspect them.
Browser should now stay open and show the real Okta login page. Authenticate with Yubikey.
Error: 'please install the driver' — pass --download-browser-driver to auto-install Playwright/Chromium.

instant_browser_close.symptom: Browser opens and closes in ~2 seconds, 'Invalid role string only 0 tokens'
instant_browser_close.cause: Stale storageState.json replaying expired Okta session

url_empty_in_idp_account.symptom: Error: URL empty in idp account
url_empty_in_idp_account.cause: ~/.saml2aws config file missing or URL field empty
url_empty_in_idp_account.fix: Write ~/.saml2aws config directly with correct URL, or run orgcli config saml2aws

wrong_version.symptom: Various compatibility issues with brew-installed version
wrong_version.cause: brew installs latest (e.g. 2.36.19) which may differ from the validated 2.36.17

config_template.content:
[default]
name = default
url = https://yourorg.okta.com/home/amazon_aws/0oaXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX357/272
username = <firstname.lastname>
provider = Browser
mfa = FIDO
aws_urn = urn:amazon:webservices
aws_session_duration = 3600
aws_profile = default
disable_sessions = true
